title: Grin Quarry
short_description: Work out how many blocks each mining job takes — walls, floors and 3D rooms — before you swing the pickaxe.
description: Welcome to the quarry, miner! The foreman marks out block-built walls, floors and rooms in a chunky voxel world, and YOU work out how many blocks the job takes before swinging the pickaxe — get it wrong and you mine straight into Mrs. Higgins' basement again. Grade bands ramp from counting blocks in rows and small walls, to working out wall areas (7 long × 4 high) and missing sides, to full 3D room volumes shown in isometric block view (4 × 3 × 2 = how many blocks?). A free online area and volume game for kids in grades 1–5 with a blocky building-game look, streak bonuses feeding your score and GP.
controls: Mouse / tap the number of blocks the job needs.
